$comment: Architecture-level context graph for Email-Agent V1, seeded from the approved G0.5 architecture (not derived from Python imports — project is in foundation phase). nodes = major components; edges = dependency direction (cause depends_on effect), dependency direction points inward toward the domain per Clean/Onion. invariants = health rules the L4 verifier enforces. freeze_boundary: src/**.
seed_source: G0.5 chosen architecture (PLAN.md) + G0 Cognitive Design (decisions/decisions-manifest.md)

nodes.role: HTTP entry point (routes). Delegates to application use cases. Exposes GET /health.
Local CLI entry point. Delegates to application use cases.
Orchestrates request -> DraftingService -> returns preview in PENDING state. Thin; no business rules.

Handles explicit human approval; only if domain Approval is valid does it convert the approved EmailDraft to an immutable EmailMessage and RETURN it (no Gmail/send). Thin; LLM-free. (CORRECTION: an earlier graph draft incorrectly listed ApproveEmailUseCase -> DeliveryService; the verified M4 module returns EmailMessage and stops. The approve-then-deliver composition is owned by SendEmailUseCase.)

Orchestrates approve-then-deliver: invokes ApproveEmailUseCase (M4) to obtain the immutable EmailMessage, then DeliveryService (M6) to send that EXACT instance. Single application-layer owner of the send composition; the interface delegates /send to exactly this use case (AC-UI-1). Builds no Approval; rebuilds no EmailMessage.
Coordinates request -> AnthropicAdapter -> DraftValidator -> domain validation -> lifecycle transition to AWAIT_APPROVAL.
Coordinates the immutable EmailMessage -> GmailAdapter -> send; explicit timeouts + unknown-delivery handling. Only called from APPROVED state.
Core aggregate: recipients, subject, body, tone, purpose, lifecycle state (DRAFTED/AWAIT_APPROVAL/APPROVED/SENT). Guards transitions. Becomes an immutable EmailMessage on approval.
Value object representing explicit human approval. send() legal only from APPROVED state.
Recipient value object. Never inferred; only explicitly provided/approved addresses. Part of the immutable final draft.
Business rules: required fields, clarification-required logic, approval validity, recipient resolution rules.
Immutable artifact produced after explicit approval. The approved EmailDraft is converted into an EmailMessage before DeliveryService invokes GmailAdapter. This is the artifact delivered to Gmail.
Concrete LLM adapter (Anthropic). Returns structured data only; never sends email, never sees secrets. Explicit timeout. Performs no validation.
Concrete email adapter (Gmail OAuth). Performs the send of an EmailMessage; only invoked post-approval. Explicit timeout; unknown-state reporting.
Centralized typed configuration (pydantic-settings). Loads LLM key, model, app config from env; validates on construction.
Isolated credential storage for Gmail OAuth tokens. Secrets never logged/committed/prompted.

Validation at the application/infrastructure boundary. Validates AnthropicAdapter structured output (and external inputs) before the application creates or updates an EmailDraft. Domain keeps business policies; structural validation lives here.

invariants.domain_inward: Domain layer (EmailDraft, Approval, Recipient, DraftPolicy, EmailMessage) imports no infrastructure and no framework (no FastAPI, no Anthropic SDK, no Gmail SDK). Dependency direction is always inward.
invariants.approval_gate: No email reaches Gmail without an explicit deterministic Approval in the APPROVED state. GmailAdapter is only invoked from DeliveryService, which is only called by SendEmailUseCase after ApproveEmailUseCase returns a valid APPROVED EmailMessage.
invariants.llm_output_validated: AnthropicAdapter returns structured data only. DraftValidator (application/infrastructure boundary) validates every LLM output before the application creates or updates an EmailDraft.
invariants.outbound_timeout: Every outbound network call (AnthropicAdapter, GmailAdapter) has an explicit timeout value.
invariants.secrets_hygiene: Secrets (LLM key, OAuth tokens) never enter prompts and never enter logs. Secrets are withheld from the LLM by data minimization.
invariants.artifact_identity: The delivered artifact (EmailMessage) must be identical to the explicitly approved artifact. The email delivered to Gmail is byte-identical to the version the human approved.
invariants.state_ownership: Application owns workflow state. The LLM owns no application state — it produces structured data only and never transitions, approves, or persists draft state.

freeze_boundary: $comment: globs the driver may edit; everything else is off-limits without explicit user request
